playbook.intent: Move from the messy starting condition to the explicit done state for: Test strategy from scratch for a new product. By end of the engagement: a written test strategy document signed off by eng + product, a risk-ranked feature matrix, a defined test pyramid shape with target coverage per layer, tooling choices locked (unit / contract / e2e / perf / a11y / sec), CI quality gates wired, and a 30/60/90 entry-criteria milestone plan.
playbook.scope: By end of the engagement: a written test strategy document signed off by eng + product, a risk-ranked feature matrix, a defined test pyramid shape with target coverage per layer, tooling choices locked (unit / contract / e2e / perf / a11y / sec), CI quality gates wired, and a 30/60/90 entry-criteria milestone plan.

success-criteria.criterion: Done-state achieved as described in the scope: By end of the engagement: a written test strategy document signed off by eng + product, a risk-ranked feature matrix, a defined test pyramid shape with target coverage per layer, tooling choices locked (unit / contract / e2e / perf / a11y / sec), CI quality gates wired, and a 30/60/90 entry-criteria milestone plan.
Decision doc signed: continue / iterate / kill, backed by evidence.
Runbook + acceptance criteria in source control, handed to on-call / next owner.
All must-fix issues from Harden / Pilot closed; nice-to-fix backlog ticketed.

stage.name: Audit
stage.intent: Get an honest map of where things stand today for: Test strategy from scratch for a new product.

tasks.task: Inventory current state, owners, and recent incidents
Identify the top 3 risks that block the desired outcome
Surface unknowns and missing telemetry up front

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if all top-3 risks have a named owner; otherwise re-scope.

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Convert audit findings into a defensible execution plan with explicit cuts.

tasks.task: Define done-state acceptance criteria
Sequence the smallest set of changes that ship the outcome
Cut everything that does not block the done state

outputs.output: Non-goals list (what we are NOT doing)

stage.decision-gate: Advance if every plan item maps to an acceptance criterion; rewrite the plan otherwise.

stage.name: Build
stage.intent: Land the first vertical slice end-to-end in a real environment.

tasks.task: Implement the slice behind a flag or in a sandbox
Wire telemetry from day one
Get a real human (not just CI) to use it

outputs.output: Working slice in a non-prod environment

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the slice runs end-to-end with one real user; loop on Build otherwise.

stage.name: Harden
stage.intent: Find the failure modes before users do.

tasks.task: Run failure-mode tests against the slice (load, edge cases, abuse)
Close every must-fix; ticket every nice-to-fix
Re-run telemetry to confirm no regression

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with zero open must-fixes; otherwise stay in Harden.

stage.name: Pilot
stage.intent: Run with a controlled blast radius before broad rollout.

tasks.task: Roll out to a controlled subset (canary, beta team, single client)
Measure against acceptance criteria with real traffic / real work
Capture rollback signal in writing

stage.decision-gate: Advance if pilot meets all acceptance criteria; pause for fix or revert otherwise.

stage.name: Rollout
stage.intent: Move from pilot to general availability with confidence.

tasks.task: Stage the rollout in defined cohorts / regions / risk bands
Hold each stage open until telemetry is clean
Communicate state to stakeholders at each step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next cohort only after the previous is stable for the agreed window.

stage.name: Operate
stage.intent: Hand off as a steady-state operation, not a hero ticket.

tasks.task: Document the runbook for on-call
Define the SLO + alert + escalation chain
Schedule the next review cycle

outputs.output: SLO + alert config in source control

stage.decision-gate: Advance when on-call can resolve the top-3 likely incidents without the original author.

stage.name: Review
stage.intent: Close the loop with a written retro and clear next-cycle bets.

tasks.task: Compile evidence trail + metrics from rollout
Write retro: what worked, what didn't, what we are changing
Decide explicit continue / iterate / kill for the next cycle

outputs.output: Continue / iterate / kill decision for next cycle

stage.decision-gate: A written decision is mandatory; no 'see how it goes'.

extra.value: ['Tooling holy wars — picking the stack is a side-effect, not the goal', Org-design / hiring changes outside the scope of this engagement, Speculative work without an acceptance criterion to test against]
[Stakeholder + decision-maker named at kickoff, Access to the systems / dashboards / repos the playbook touches, Budget signed for the tooling + telemetry this playbook depends on]
